pi_items.source: Web search confirmed this is a real KSP version. Maven Repository shows com.google.devtools.ksp.gradle.plugin version 1.9.22-1.0.17 exists and is designed for Kotlin 1.9.22. Also referenced in task.json description at line 8.
Web search confirmed Kotlin 1.9.22 was released December 21, 2023. Also appears in setup_task.sh line 48 and matches KSP version requirement.
Web search found multiple references to androidx.room version 2.6.1 existing in Maven Central. Appears in setup_task.sh line 91 as val roomVersion = "2.6.1".

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a synthetic NoteApp Android project with KSP 1.9.22-1.0.17 (verified real version for Kotlin 1.9.22), Kotlin 1.9.22 (verified release: December 21, 2023), and Room 2.6.1 (verified version exists in Maven Central). All project files are generated synthetically by setup_task.sh. The task directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NoteApp.
